full_description: Use the flying hand to repeatedly move blocks, temporarily stacking one block on another when needed, until the red, green, and blue blocks are ordered left to right on the same shelf.
schema: {A} notifies the red block, {B} notifies the green block, {C} notifies the blue block.
preference: num of words should not exceed 20.
